modules.gui.table package#

Submodules#

modules.gui.table.copy_table_widget module#

class CopyTableWidget[source]#

Bases: QTableWidget

backspace()[source]#

Called when backspace is pressed. Extended in container classes.

copy()[source]#

Copy table data onto the clipboard.

getRowIndex(name: str)[source]#

Get the row index of an item in the table (or where it SHOULD be on the table).

Parmas:

name (str): the name of the item

Returns:

(int): the row index for that object in the table (bool): whether or not the object actually exists in the table

keyPressEvent(self, event: PySide6.QtGui.QKeyEvent) → None[source]#
staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("CopyTableWidget" inherits "QTableWidget": )#

modules.gui.table.flag module#

class FlagTableWidget(series: Series, mainwindow: QWidget, manager)[source]#

Bases: QDockWidget

closeEvent(event)[source]#

Remove self from manager table list.

createMenus()[source]#

Create the menu for the object table widget.

createTable()[source]#

Create the table widget.

Params:

objdata (dict): the dictionary containing the object table data objects

deleteFlags(match_name=False)[source]#

Delete an object or objects on every section.

editFlag()[source]#

Edit a flag.

export()[source]#

Export the object list as a csv file.

find(event=None)[source]#

Focus the field on a flag in the series.

flagContextMenu(event=None)[source]#

Executed when button is right-clicked: pulls up menu for user to modify objects.

getFilteredFlags(section: Section = None)[source]#

Get the flags that pass the filters.

getSelectedFlag()[source]#

Get the name of the object highlighted by the user.

Returns:

(str): the name of the object

getSelectedFlags()[source]#

Get the name of the objects highlighted by the user.

Returns:

(list): the name of the objects

insertRow(r: int)[source]#

Add a row to the table.

Params:

r (int): the row to add to the table

markResolved(resolved=True)[source]#

Mark a flag as resolved or unresolved.

Params:

resolved (bool): the resolved status

passesFilters(flag: Flag)[source]#

Check if an object passes the filters.

Params:

name (str): the name of the object

refresh()[source]#

Refresh the object lists.

removeColorFilter()[source]#

Remove the color filter.

removeRow(r: int)[source]#

Remove a row from the table.

Params:

r (int): the row to remove

resizeEvent(event)[source]#

Resize the table when window is resized.

setColorFilter(use_selected=True)[source]#

Set the color filter for the list.

setColumns()[source]#

Set the columns to display.

setCommentFilter()[source]#

Set a new regex filter for the comments.

setREFilter()[source]#

Set a new regex filter for the list.

setRow(flag: Flag, row: int, resize=True)[source]#

Set the data for a row of the table.

Params:

name (str): the name of the object row (int): the row to enter this data into

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("FlagTableWidget" inherits "QDockWidget": )#
toggleDisplayResolved()[source]#

Toggle whether or not resolved flags are displayed in the table.

updateSection(section: Section)[source]#

Update the flags for a section.

Params:

section (Section): the section to update

updateTitle()[source]#

Update the title of the table.

class HelpWidget(mode)[source]#

Bases: QDockWidget

closeEvent(self, event: PySide6.QtGui.QCloseEvent) → None[source]#
createTable()[source]#

Create the table widget.

setRow(r: int, key_desc: tuple)[source]#

Set the data for a row.

Params:

r (int): the row index key_desc (tuple): key, description

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("HelpWidget" inherits "QDockWidget": )#

modules.gui.table.history module#

class HistoryTableWidget(log_set: LogSet, mainwindow: QWidget, obj_names: list = None)[source]#

Bases: QDockWidget

createTable(log_set: LogSet)[source]#

Create the table widget.

filterLogs(log_set: LogSet, obj_names: list)[source]#

Remove logs unrelated to objects of interest.

setRow(r: int, log: Log)[source]#

Set the data for a row.

Params:

r (int): the row index snum (int): the section number

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("HistoryTableWidget" inherits "QDockWidget": )#

modules.gui.table.object module#

class ObjectTableWidget(series: Series, mainwindow: QWidget, manager)[source]#

Bases: QDockWidget

addTo3D()[source]#

Generate a 3D view of an object

addToGroup(log_event=True)[source]#

Add objects to a group.

bulkCurate(curation_status: str)[source]#

Set the curation status for multiple selected objects.

Params:

curation_status (str): “”, “Needs curation” or “Curated”

checkCurate(item: QTableWidgetItem)[source]#

User checked a curate checkbox.

closeEvent(event)[source]#

Remove self from manager table list.

createMenus()[source]#

Create the menu for the object table widget.

createTable()[source]#

Create the table widget.

Params:

objdata (dict): the dictionary containing the object table data objects

createZtrace(cross_sectioned=True)[source]#

Create a ztrace from selected objects.

deleteGroup()[source]#

Delete an object group.

deleteObjects()[source]#

Delete an object from the entire series.

edit3D()[source]#

Edit the 3D options for an object or set of objects.

editAlignment()[source]#

Edit alignment for object(s).

editAttributes()[source]#

Edit the name of an object in the entire series.

editComment()[source]#

Edit the comment of the object.

editRadius()[source]#

Modify the radius of the trace on an entire object.

editShape()[source]#

Modify the shape of the traces on an entire object.

export()[source]#

Export the object list as a csv file.

findFirst(event=None)[source]#

Focus the field on the first occurence of an object in the series.

findLast()[source]#

Focus the field on the last occurence of an object in the series.

getFilteredObjects()[source]#

Get the names of the objects that pass the filter.

getSelectedObject() → str[source]#

Get the name of the object highlighted by the user.

Returns:

(str): the name of the object

getSelectedObjects() → list[str][source]#

Get the name of the objects highlighted by the user.

Returns:

(list): the name of the objects

hideObj(hide=True)[source]#

Edit whether or not an object is hidden in the entire series.

Params:

hide (bool): True if the object should be hidden

objectContextMenu(event=None)[source]#

Executed when button is right-clicked: pulls up menu for user to modify objects.

passesFilters(name: str)[source]#

Check if an object passes the filters.

Params:

name (str): the name of the object

refresh()[source]#

Refresh the object lists.

remove3D()[source]#

Remove object(s) from the scene.

removeAllTags()[source]#

Remove all tags from all traces on selected objects.

removeFromAllGroups(log_event=True)[source]#

Remove a set of traces from all groups.

removeFromGroup(log_event=True)[source]#

Remove objects from a group.

renameGroup()[source]#

Rename an object group.

resizeEvent(event)[source]#

Resize the table when window is resized.

setCRFilter()[source]#

Set the filter for curation.

setColumns()[source]#

Set the columns to display.

setGroupFilter()[source]#

Set a new group filter for the list.

setREFilter()[source]#

Set a new regex filter for the list.

setRow(name: str, row: int, resize=True)[source]#

Set the data for a row of the table.

Params:

name (str): the name of the object row (int): the row to enter this data into

setTagFilter()[source]#

Set a new tag filter for the list.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("ObjectTableWidget" inherits "QDockWidget": )#
updateObjects(names)[source]#

Update the data for a set of objects.

Params:

names (iterable): the names of the objects to update

updateTitle()[source]#

Update the title of the table.

viewHistory()[source]#

View the history for a set of objects.

modules.gui.table.section module#

class SectionTableWidget(series: Series, mainwindow: QWidget, manager)[source]#

Bases: QDockWidget

closeEvent(event)[source]#

Remove self from manager table list.

createMenus()[source]#

Create the menu for the trace table widget.

createTable()[source]#

Create the table widget.

deleteSections()[source]#

Delete the sections selected by the user.

editSrc()[source]#

Modify the image source for a single section.

editThickness()[source]#

Modify the section thickness for a set of sections.

export()[source]#

Export the trace list as a csv file.

findSection(event)[source]#

Find the section selected by the user.

format()[source]#

Format the rows and columns of the table.

getSelectedSection()[source]#

Get the section that is selected by the user.

getSelectedSections()[source]#

Get the trace items that iare selected by the user.

insertSection(before=True)[source]#

Insert a section into the series.

lockSections(lock=True)[source]#

Lock or unlock a set of sections.

matchBC()[source]#

Match the brightness/contrast of the selected sections with the current section.

modifyAllSrc()[source]#

Modify the image source for all sections.

reorderSections()[source]#

Reorder the sections so that they are in order.

resizeEvent(event)[source]#

Resize the table when window is resized.

sectionContextMenu(event=None)[source]#

Executed when button is right-clicked: pulls up menu for user to modify traces.

setBC()[source]#

Set the brightness/contrast for a set of sections.

setRow(r: int, snum: int)[source]#

Set the data for a row.

Params:

r (int): the row index snum (int): the section number

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("SectionTableWidget" inherits "QDockWidget": )#
updateSection(snum: int)[source]#

Update the tables for a single section.

Params:

snum (int): the section number to update

Bases: object

lessThan(s1, s2)[source]#

modules.gui.table.trace module#

class TraceTableWidget(series: Series, section: Section, mainwindow: QWidget, manager)[source]#

Bases: QDockWidget

closeEvent(event)[source]#

Remove self from manager table list.

createMenus()[source]#

Create the menu for the trace table widget.

createTable(section: Section)[source]#

Create the table widget.

Params:

tracedict (dict): the dictionary containing the object table data objects

deleteTraces()[source]#

Delete a set of traces.

editRadius()[source]#

Edit the radius for a set of traces.

editShape()[source]#

Modify the shape of the traces on an entire object.

editTraces()[source]#

Edit a set of traces.

export()[source]#

Export the trace list as a csv file.

findTrace(event=None)[source]#

Select a trace on the section.

getFilteredObjects()[source]#

Get the names of the objects that pass the filter.

getSelectedItem()[source]#

Get the trace item that is selected by the user.

getSelectedItems()[source]#

Get the trace items that iare selected by the user.

hideTraces(hide=True)[source]#

Hide a set of traces.

Params:

hide (bool): True if the traces should be hidden

passesFilters(name: str)[source]#

Check if an object passes the filters.

Params:

name (str): the name of the object

resizeEvent(event)[source]#

Resize the table when window is resized.

setColumns()[source]#

Set the columns to display.

setContours(names, resize=True)[source]#

Set the table data for a set of contours.

Params:

name (iterable): the names of contours to update

setGroupFilter()[source]#

Set a new group filter for the list.

setREFilter()[source]#

Set a new regex filter for the list.

setRow(name: str, index: int, trace_data: TraceData, row: int, resize_columns=True)[source]#

Populate a row with trace item data.

Params:

name (str): the name of the trace index (int): the index of the trace in the contour trace_data (TraceData): the object containing the relevant trace data row (int): the row to modify

setTagFilter()[source]#

Set a new tag filter for the list.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("TraceTableWidget" inherits "QDockWidget": )#
traceContextMenu(event=None)[source]#

Executed when button is right-clicked: pulls up menu for user to modify traces.

updateTitle()[source]#

Update the title of the table.

modules.gui.table.ztrace module#

class ZtraceTableWidget(series: Series, mainwindow: QWidget, manager)[source]#

Bases: QDockWidget

addTo3D()[source]#

Generate a 3D view of an object

addToGroup(log_event=True)[source]#

Add objects to a group.

closeEvent(event)[source]#

Remove self from manager table list.

createMenus()[source]#

Create the menu for the trace table widget.

createTable()[source]#

Create the table widget.

delete()[source]#

Delete a set of ztraces.

editAlignment()[source]#

Edit alignment for ztrace(s).

editAttributes()[source]#

Edit the name of a ztrace.

export()[source]#

Export the trace list as a csv file.

getSelectedName()[source]#

Get the trace item that is selected by the user.

getSelectedNames()[source]#

Get the trace items that iare selected by the user.

passesFilters(name)[source]#

Determine if an object will be displayed in the table based on existing filters.

Params:

ztrace_name (str): the name of the ztrace

refresh()[source]#

Refresh the tables.

remove3D()[source]#

Remove object(s) from the scene.

removeFromAllGroups(log_event=True)[source]#

Remove a set of traces from all groups.

removeFromGroup(log_event=True)[source]#

Remove objects from a group.

resizeEvent(event)[source]#

Resize the table when window is resized.

setGroupFilter()[source]#

Set a new group filter for the list.

setREFilter()[source]#

Set a new regex filter for the list.

setRow(ztrace_name: str, row: int, resize=True)[source]#

Populate a row with trace item data.

Params:

ztrace_name (str): the name of the ztrace row (int): the row to insert the data

smooth()[source]#

Smooth a set of ztraces.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("ZtraceTableWidget" inherits "QDockWidget": )#
updateTitle()[source]#

Update the title of the table.

updateZtraces(ztrace_names: set)[source]#

Update the specified ztraces.

ztraceContextMenu(event=None)[source]#

Executed when button is right-clicked: pulls up menu for user to modify objects.
